A Relic Reborn._line: The 2.x Zodiac questline (A Relic Reborn) — start 'The Weaponsmith of Legend' from Nedrick Ironheart at Vesper Bay, Western Thanalan, which introduces the blacksmith Gerolt in North Shroud. Eight stages: Relic → Zenith → Atma → Animus → Novus → Nexus → Zodiac → Zeta.
A Relic Reborn.Atma: IL100. Finish the one-time quest 'Up in Arms' to meet Jalzahn (he handles upgrades from here on). With your Zenith weapon equipped, run FATEs to collect all 12 Atma — ~20% drop, the type set by the zone (La Noscea: Lion, Water-bearer, Ram, Crab, Fish; Thanalan: Bull, Scales, Twins, Scorpion; Black Shroud: Archer, Goat, Maiden). Trade the 12 Atma + weapon to Jalzahn.
A Relic Reborn.Animus: IL100, the longest step. Finish 'Trials of the Braves' to meet G'jusana, then complete 9 'Trials of the Braves' books (100 Poetics each, 900 total — one at a time, finished before buying the next) with your Atma weapon equipped. Each book is a checklist of enemies, dungeons, FATEs and leves; the FATEs are the slow part, and some Grand Company leves need Chief Sergeant rank. Then trade to Jalzahn.
A Relic Reborn.Nexus: IL115. Finish 'Mmmmmm, Soulglazed Relics', then have Jalzahn Soulglaze your Novus weapon so it absorbs Light from duties run with it equipped — dungeons, trials, FATEs, Treasure Hunts, PvP (Paladin: Soulglaze both sword and shield). Some duties give bonus Light every 2 hours. Fastest unsynced: Final Coil of Bahamut Turn 4, Bowl of Embers (Extreme), Thornmarch (Extreme), The Aurum Vale, Thousand Maws of Toto-Rak. Check progress with the Zodiac Glass. No materials — a Light grind (100 dungeon runs/day locks the duty finder until reset).
A Relic Reborn.Zeta: IL135, the final step. Finish 'Rise and Shine' to meet Remon in Swiftperch, Western La Noscea. Buy 12 Mahatma (50 Poetics each, 600 total) — one at a time — and awaken each by running duties with the weapon equipped (same fast duties as Nexus). Check progress with the Zodiac Glass. Once all 12 are awakened, return to Jalzahn for the Zeta weapon. First completion unlocks the follow-ups 'The Vital Title' and 'Kettle to the Mettle'; Drake in Hyrstmill sells replicas of earlier steps once you own the real Zeta.
A Relic Reborn.Relic: Base IL80 weapon. Each job does its own 'A Relic Reborn' quest from Gerolt — kill set enemies, clear level 50 dungeons/trials (unsynced is fine; Amdapor Keep must be unlocked) and gather a few items. Each job also prepares a specific crafted weapon melded with two materia (craft it or buy off the Market Board; mats include Unspoiled Node items and drops from The Wanderer's Palace and Trauma Queen). The quest ends by turning in 1 Radz-at-Han Quenching Oil (15 Poetics from Auriana in Mor Dhona). Tip: grab 3 Thavnairian Mist (20 Poetics each) at the same time for the Zenith step.
A Relic Reborn.Zenith: IL90. Interact with the Furnace next to Gerolt in North Shroud and trade your base Zodiac weapon plus 3 Thavnairian Mist (20 Poetics each, from Auriana in Mor Dhona). No quest — just the exchange.
A Relic Reborn.Novus: IL110. Finish 'Celestial Radiance' and 'Star Light, Star Bright' to meet Hubairtin in Central Thanalan. Buy 3 Superior Enchanted Ink (25 Poetics each) for a Sphere Scroll, which then needs 75 Alexandrite plus 75 infused materia. Alexandrite: buy Mysterious Maps from Auriana (75 Poetics each), Decipher then Dig, and open the chest for 5 each — 15 maps per weapon (~1,125 Poetics); one free map a day from Brangwine's 'Morbid Motivation' (Duty Roulette: High-level Dungeons). Materia: infuse 75 successfully, Grade I → II → III → IV; fails cost the materia but not the Alexandrite, so prepare ~20 of each grade (cheapest stats on your server). Trade to Jalzahn when done.
A Relic Reborn.Zodiac: IL125 (Zodiac Braves). Finish 'Wherefore Art Thou, Zodiac' and its 4 sub-quests (3 in Mor Dhona, 1 in Central Thanalan), each rewarding a special material. Per weapon you gather: 4 Bombard Core (20,000 Company Seals each), 4 Sacred Spring Water (200 Poetics each), one each of Furite Sand, Allagan Resin, Bronze Lake Crystal and Brass Kettle (100,000 gil each), plus 8 HQ crafted items (Perfect Firewood, Perfect Pestle, Perfect Mortar, Furnace Ring, Perfect Vellum, Perfect Cloth, Perfect Pounce, Tailor-made Eel Pie — Master Recipe I crafts whose ingredients come from desynthing Silver Bazaar items). First weapon turns in to Gerolt ('His Dark Materia'); later weapons to Jalzahn ('Zodiac Weapon Recreation'). Unlock the listed Hard dungeons for the quest steps.

Anima Weapons._line: The Heavensward Anima questline — unlock with 'An Unexpected Proposal', then repeat 'Soul Without Life' per weapon (Ardashir in Azys Lla handles upgrades). Eight stages: Animated → Awoken → Anima → Hyperconductive → Reconditioned → Sharpened → Complete → Lux.
Anima Weapons.Animated: IL170. Per weapon, hand Ardashir 1 Astral Nodule and 1 Umbral Nodule (from Syndony in Mor Dhona). Get them by farming 1 Luminous Crystal from FATEs in each of the 6 Heavensward zones (~33% drop): Wind in The Sea of Clouds, Fire in Azys Lla, Lightning in The Churning Mists (-> Astral Nodule); Ice in Coerthas Western Highlands, Earth in The Dravanian Forelands, Water in The Dravanian Hinterlands (-> Umbral Nodule). Alternatively trade in a Zodiac Zeta weapon (you lose it).
Anima Weapons.Awoken: IL200. Quest 'Toughening Up'. Clear 10 dungeons IN ORDER with the Animated weapon equipped when you click the exit portal (soloable unsynced via Unrestricted Party): Snowcloak, Sastasha (Hard), The Sunken Temple of Qarn (Hard), The Keeper of the Lake, The Wanderer's Palace (Hard), Amdapor Keep (Hard), The Dusk Vigil, Sohm Al, The Aery, The Vault. Then turn in at Azys Lla. No materials.
Anima Weapons.Anima: IL210. Quest 'Coming into Its Own'. Collect 10 each of Unidentifiable Bone, Shell, Ore and Seeds (40 total — 150 Poetics each from Sundry Splendors, or tribal tokens / Alexander: Gordias loot) and 4 each of Adamantite Francesca, Titanium Alloy Mirror, Dispelling Arrow and Kingcake (16 total — crafted, Market Board, or 5,000 Company Seals each). Trade all to Cristiana in Mor Dhona for 4 special items, then deliver those to Gerolt.
Anima Weapons.Hyperconductive: IL230. Quest 'Finding Your Voice'. Buy 5 Aether Oil from Sundry Splendors (350 Poetics each, 1,750 total) and turn them in.
Anima Weapons.Reconditioned: IL240. Quest 'A Dream Fulfilled'. Collect roughly 57-60 each of Umbrite and Crystal Sand per weapon. Umbrite: 75 Poetics each (~4,500 total). Crystal Sand: trade with Ulan in Idyllshire (2 per trade) — best options are 5 Blue Crafters'/Gatherers' Scrip Tokens (125 Purple Scrips), or 5 Superior Enchanted Ink + 5 Thavnairian Mist (225 Poetics); buying ARR primal parts off the Market Board can be cheaper. Then have Ulan make Refined Crystal Sand and allocate the stats.
Anima Weapons.Sharpened: IL260. Quests 'Future Proof' (weapon) plus 'Cut from a Different Cloth' and 'Seeking Inspiration' (materials). Collect 50 Singing Cluster — 40 Poetics each (2,000 total), 1 from the daily 'Cut from a Different Cloth' (Duty Roulette: High-level Dungeons), and 18 from the weekly 'Seeking Inspiration' (Duty Roulette: Leveling x3). Trade to Blamprest in Idyllshire, then deliver to Ardashir.
Anima Weapons.Complete: IL270. Quests 'Born Again Anima' and 'Some Assembly Required'. Clear 3 Hard dungeons as the matching job (The Lost City of Amdapor, The Great Gubal Library, Sohm Al — the weapon only needs to be in your inventory). Then grind aetheric density with the weapon equipped (FATEs, dungeons, trials, raids); fastest is Alexander - The Eyes of the Creator (Savage) / A9S unsynced ~20 times (ilvl 610+ to solo). Also buy 15 Pneumite (100 Poetics each, or 4,000 Company Seals each) for a Newborn Soulstone. Track progress with the Enhanced Anima Glass.
Anima Weapons.Lux: IL275, the final step. One-time quests 'Body and Soul' and 'Words of Wisdom', then 'Best Friends Forever': clear 12 Hard trials in 4 groups, in group order (any order within a group) — Bowl of Embers / Howling Eye / The Navel; Thornmarch / The Whorleater / The Striking Tree / The Akh Afah Amphitheatre; Thok ast Thok / The Limitless Blue; Containment Bay S1T7 / P1T6 / Z1T9 (unlock the Warring Triad via 'Gods of Eld' and 'When the Bough Wakes'). Buy 1 Archaic Enchanted Ink (500 Poetics) and turn in for the final weapon.

Eureka Weapons._line: Stormblood Eureka weapons — upgraded entirely inside The Forbidden Land, Eureka. Start from the Antiquated weapon (level 70 job quest), then grind elemental crystals across four zones (Anemos → Pagos → Pyros → Hydatos) and turn them in to Gerolt. 15 sub-tiers: Base/+1/+2 → Anemos → Pagos/+1 → Elemental/+1/+2 → Pyros → Hydatos/+1 → Base (Physeos) → Eureka → Physeos. Crystals from an earlier zone can be farmed in a later zone too if you out-level them.
Eureka Weapons.Base: Antiquated base (IL290) is from your level 70 job quest (replacement 1,000 gil at a Calamity Salvager). In Eureka Anemos, kill Notorious Monsters (Kill-Boss FATEs) and trash for Anemos Crystals, trade them to Gerolt for 2-5 Protean Crystals each, then spend Protean Crystals: 100 (Base) → 400 (+1) → 800 (+2).
Eureka Weapons.Anemos: Anemos augment (IL355): 3 Pazuzu's Feather — 3 drop per gold-medal clear of the FATE 'Wail in the Willows' (kill Pazuzu), or buy from the Expedition Birdwatcher for 300 Protean Crystals each. Must be on the matching job to augment the +2 weapon.
Eureka Weapons.Pagos: Eureka Pagos. Get the vitiated aether kettle from Gerolt (level 25 Pagos quest, after owning an Anemos weapon). Fill it by killing NMs/trash (max 9 charges — turn in before it overflows) and trade each full charge at the Crystal Forge for 1 Frosted Protean Crystal; Pagos Crystals drop from NMs. Spend 5 Frosted (Pagos) → 10 Frosted + 500 Pagos Crystal (+1).
Eureka Weapons.Elemental: Elemental (IL370): 16 Frosted Protean Crystal + 5 Louhi's Ice. Louhi's Ice: 2 drop per gold-medal clear of the FATE 'Louhi on Ice' in Eureka Pagos, or buy from the Expedition Birdwatcher for 50 Pagos Crystals each.
Eureka Weapons.Elemental +1: Eureka Pyros. Pyros Crystals drop from Notorious Monsters (higher-level NMs drop more). You must also unlock unique Logos Actions (10 by Elemental +1, 20 by +2, 30 by Pyros). Spend 150 Pyros Crystal (+1) → 200 (+2).
Eureka Weapons.Pyros: Pyros (IL385): 300 Pyros Crystal + 5 Penthesilea's Flame, with 30 unique Logos Actions unlocked. Penthesilea's Flame: 3 drop per gold-medal clear of the FATE 'Lost Epic' (kill Penthesilea), or buy from the Expedition Birdwatcher for 50 Pyros Crystals each.
Eureka Weapons.Hydatos: Eureka Hydatos. Hydatos Crystals drop from NMs (fewer needed, but fewer drop; the FATE 'The Baldesion Arsenal: Expedition Support' is a good source while a BA run is active). Spend 50 (Hydatos) → 100 (+1) → 100 (Base Eureka) → 100 (Eureka).
Eureka Weapons.Eureka: The Eureka tier (IL405) sets the final look and maxes the non-elemental stats — a last 100 Hydatos Crystal + 5 Crystalline Scale. Crystalline Scale: 3 drop per gold-medal clear of the FATE 'Crystalline Provenance' in Eureka Hydatos (the only source — not sold by the Birdwatcher). If you only want the glamour you can stop here; Physeos maxes the elemental stats.
Eureka Weapons.Physeos: Physeos (final): identical look and stats to Eureka, plus Elemental Bonus stats that make the weapon stronger inside Eureka zones (including The Baldesion Arsenal). Takes 100 Eureka Fragment, which drop ONLY inside The Baldesion Arsenal — a full clear yields about 28 (each boss drops a share), so roughly 4 successful runs per weapon.

Resistance Weapons._line: Shadowbringers Resistance weapons (Save the Queen / Bozja). Begin in Gangos with Zlatan after the Shadowbringers MSQ and 'The City of Lost Angels'; the first weapon is free from the 'Fire in the Forge' quest chain. Six stages: Resistance → Augmented → Recollection → Law's Order → Augmented Law's Order → Blade's. Most steps trade in 'Memories of the Dying' farmed in the Bozjan Southern Front and Heavensward/Stormblood content.
Resistance Weapons.Resistance: Base weapon (IL485). The FIRST one is free from the one-time quest chain (Hail to the Queen → Path to the Past → The Bozja Incident → Fire in the Forge). Each LATER weapon needs the repeatable 'Resistance Is (Not) Futile': 4 Thavnairian Scalepowder (250 Poetics each, 1,000 total — Auriana, Hismena, or Sundry Splendors).
Resistance Weapons.Augmented: IL500. Repeatable 'For Want of a Memory'. Trade 20 each of Tortured, Sorrowful and Harrowing Memories of the Dying — random drops from Skirmishes, Critical Engagements and enemies in the Bozjan Southern Front, or 100% from gold-rated Heavensward FATEs (Tortured: Sea of Clouds / Coerthas Western Highlands; Sorrowful: Dravanian Forelands / Churning Mists; Harrowing: Dravanian Hinterlands / Azys Lla). Keep running Critical Engagements toward Rank 10 (needed later). No need for the weapon equipped or matching job.
Resistance Weapons.Recollection: IL500. Repeatable 'The Will to Resist'. Trade 6 Bitter Memories of the Dying — from synced light-party Heavensward dungeons (The Antitower is popular), Duty Roulette: Leveling (1/day), or Critical Engagements / enemies in the Bozjan Southern Front.
Resistance Weapons.Law's Order: IL510. Repeatable 'Change of Arms'. First raise Resistance Rank to 10, clear The Battle of Castrum Lacus Litore, and finish the Save the Queen story (A Sign of What's to Come / Fit for a Queen / In the Queen's Image — includes a solo duty and the Delubrum Reginae raid). Then trade 15 Loathsome Memories of the Dying — Castrum Lacus Litore (5), any Crystal Tower alliance raid (1), or Critical Engagements (1 random).
Resistance Weapons.Augmented Law's Order: IL515. One-time prerequisite: finish 'The Resistance Remembers' (18 Haunting Memories of the Dying from Shadow of Mhach raids / Gyr Abania FATEs + 18 Vexatious Memories of the Dying from Return to Ivalice raids / Othard FATEs — done ONCE, not per weapon). Then the repeatable 'A New Path of Resistance': trade 15 Timeworn Artifacts — 3 per Delubrum Reginae clear (the fast farm, ideally a Party Finder group with Essences), or 1 random from Palace of the Dead (higher floors drop more). Optional: reallocate stats by turning in 4 Aetherial Sealant (100 Poetics each) to the Allagan Node in Gangos.
Resistance Weapons.Blade's: IL535, the final weapon. Second one-time grind first: unlock Zadnor ('A New Playing Field'), then complete 'What Dreams Are Made Of' and the one-time quests Spare Parts (30 Compact Axle + 30 Compact Spring), Tell Me a Story (30 'A Day in the Life: Battles for the Realm' + 30 'A Day in the Life: Beyond the Rift') and A Fond Memory (30 Bleak Memory of the Dying + 30 Lurid Memory of the Dying) — from Zadnor skirmishes/critical engagements, or synced Alexander/Omega/Eden raids; done ONCE. Then the repeatable 'Irresistible': trade 15 Raw Emotions — 3 per The Dalriada clear, 2 per Delubrum Reginae, 1 from synced Stormblood dungeons (Hells' Lid is popular), or 1 random from Heaven-on-High.

Manderville Weapons._line: Endwalker Manderville weapons, tied to the Hildibrand questline. Unlock by finishing the Endwalker MSQ and the full Hildibrand arc ('The Rise and Fall of Gentlemen' up to 'The Imperfect Gentleman'), then 'Make It a Manderville' for the first relic. Every stage just buys 3 of a Poetics item (500 each, 1,500 total) from Jubrunnah in Radz-at-Han (12.2, 10.9). Four stages: Manderville → Amazing → Majestic → Mandervillous.
Manderville Weapons.Manderville: IL615. First relic from 'Make It a Manderville'; later weapons from the repeatable 'Make Another Manderville'. Buy 3 Manderium Meteorite (500 Poetics each, 1,500 total) from Jubrunnah.
Manderville Weapons.Amazing: IL630 (Amazing Manderville). Gated behind the Hildibrand quest 'Generational Bonding'. Repeatable 'The Next Mander-level': buy 3 Complementary Chondrite (500 Poetics each) from Jubrunnah.
Manderville Weapons.Majestic: IL645 (Majestic Manderville). Gated behind 'Not from Around Here'. Repeatable 'In Need of Adjustment': buy 3 Amplifying Achondrite (500 Poetics each) from Jubrunnah. This tier lets you allocate two attributes (max 293) plus a third (72); re-allocate later at the House Manderville Alchemist for 1 Amplifying Achondrite.
Manderville Weapons.Mandervillous: IL665 (Mandervillous), the final tier. Gated behind 'Gentlemen at Heart'. Repeatable 'Positively Mandervillous': buy 3 Cosmic Crystallite (500 Poetics each) from Jubrunnah. Allocate two attributes (max 306) plus a third (72); re-allocate at the House Manderville Alchemist for 1 Cosmic Crystallite. Strongest level 90 weapon.

Phantom Weapons._line: Dawntrail Phantom weapons (Occult Crescent). Unlock the Occult Crescent questline up to 'Unfamiliar Territory' after the Dawntrail MSQ; the first relic comes from Lydirceil in Phantom Village. Every tier has a one-time unlock grind, then per weapon you exchange 1,500 Allagan Tomestones of Mathematics for 3 'Arcanite' from Ermina in Phantom Village and trade them (plus the previous weapon) to Dodokkuli. Three tiers so far: Penumbrae → Umbrae → Obscurum, with a fourth (Occultum, IL795) coming in patch 7.55.
Phantom Weapons.Penumbrae: IL745. First relic via the one-time 'Arcane Artistry' → 'Forging the Phantasmal', which needs 3 each of six Demiatma (Azurite, Verdigris, Malachite, Realgar, Caput Mortuum, Orpiment) — random drops from Occult Crescent South Horn FATEs/Critical Encounters (~20% from CEs, ~5% from FATEs), or from the matching Dawntrail zone FATEs. Then PER WEAPON: 1,500 Mathematics tomes → 3 Arcanite (Ermina) → Dodokkuli. Keep ~600 Bicolor Gemstones for the Umbrae step.
Phantom Weapons.Umbrae: IL760. One-time gate: 'Keeping the Old Ways Alive' (Roneek Glue 300,000 gil; Ut'ohmu Siderite 600 Bicolor Gemstones; Synthetic Dark Matter Alpha/Beta/Gamma — crafted or Market Board) and 'Aether, Aether, Everywhere' — fill the Aetherwell Array with 10,000 each of green/blue/red/yellow aether from Duty Roulettes (Green=High-level Dungeons, Blue=Alliance Raids, Red=Trials, Yellow=Normal Raids; ~13-14 days; don't abandon or you restart). Then PER WEAPON: 3 Waxing Arcanite (1,500 Math tomes) + the matching Penumbrae weapon → Dodokkuli.
Phantom Weapons.Obscurum: IL775, the current top tier (Occultum / IL795 arrives in patch 7.55). One-time gate: 'Timeworn Techniques' (Umbral Clay 500,000 gil; Aspected Aetheroconductor / Aether Agglomerate / Aetherocatalyst — crafted or Market Board) and 'In Pursuit of Perfection' — fill the Phantom Glass with 1,200 Crystal Paste over four turn-ins (100/200/300/600) from level 91-100 duties and roulettes (no overcap risk; don't abandon or you restart). Then PER WEAPON: 3 Waning Arcanite (1,500 Math tomes) + the matching Umbrae weapon → Dodokkuli.

Lucis Tools._line: ARR Disciple of the Hand & Land relic tools — start the quest 'Just Tooling Around' from Guiding Star in Mor Dhona (X:21.9, Y:6.9). Three stages: Mastercraft (IL55) -> Supra (IL75) -> Lucis (IL90).
Lucis Tools.Mastercraft: Base IL55 tools earned through your level 50 Disciple of the Hand or Land class quest. Each crafter tool is a level 50 three-star craft; no relic currency needed yet.
Lucis Tools.Supra: IL75 tools (patch 2.3) from Talan in Mor Dhona (X:22, Y:6). Every class also turns in 2 Fieldcraft Demimateria III and 1 Mastercraft Demimateria. [[Crafters]] Craft a class-specific item from a gathered material (mostly an Unspoiled Node item) and combine it with the 2 Fieldcraft Demimateria III into the final turn-in. [[Gatherers]] Hand in a Talan Seal instead — Miner 30 Antumbral Rock, Botanist 30 Redolent Log. [[Fisher]] Catch 1 Olgoi-Khorkhoi: hook a Storm Rider, then mooch it during Heat Waves.
Lucis Tools.Lucis: IL90 tools (patch 2.5) from Talan. Every class trades its Supra tool plus 5 Moonstone (about 4,000 gil each, 20,000 total). [[Crafters]] Craft a class-specific final item (~36,500 gil all-in; Weaver ~37,400, Culinarian ~29,150). [[Gatherers]] Hand in a Talan Mastery Seal — Miner 15 Magicked Oilcloth + 30 Antumbral Rock, Botanist 15 Bamboo Paper + 30 Redolent Log. [[Fisher]] The Mastery Seal needs 15 Glacier Crystal + 10 Gigant Clam.

Skysteel Tools._line: Heavensward Disciple of the Hand & Land tools, built at the Skysteel Manufactory in the Firmament. Hand-ins go to Denys (X:8.0, Y:10.0), with collectable turn-ins to Spanner and quest steps via Nimie and Emeny. Six stages: Skysteel -> Skysteel +1 -> Dragonsung -> Augmented Dragonsung -> Skysung -> Skybuilders'. From the Augmented Dragonsung step on, your current tool must be equipped while you gather or fish the upgrade items.
Skysteel Tools.Skysteel: Base IL440 tools. Finish the quest 'Mislaid Plans' for a Skysteel Prototype Coffer, which becomes your current class's tool; extra classes' base tools cost 80,000 gil from Denys.
Skysteel Tools.Skysteel +1: First upgrade (IL455), handed to Denys. [[Crafters]] Craft 20 of the tool's first-tier collectable — each uses one 'Oddly Specific' material (20 Purple Crafters' Scrips at a Scrip Exchange, or Market Board; ~400 scrips per tool) plus a gathered item. Atrociraptor Skin and Vampire Vine Sap aren't gatherable (Hunting ventures or Bicolor traders). [[Gatherers]] Gather 340 first-tier items + 120 hidden items from the same nodes. [[Fisher]] Catch 40 Thinker's Coral at the Thaliak River, Dravanian Hinterlands.
Skysteel Tools.Dragonsung: Second upgrade (IL475), handed to Denys, then finish the one-time quest 'In Everyone's Best Interests'. [[Crafters]] Craft 30 of the second-tier recipe (~600 Purple Crafters' Scrips of 'Oddly Specific' mats, plus gathered mats and an intermediate craft; Zonure Skin and Ovim Fleece from Hunting/Bicolor, Ala Mhigan Salt Crystal is a timed node in The Lochs). [[Gatherers]] Gather 510 second-tier items + 180 hidden. [[Fisher]] Catch 60 Dragonspine at Dragonspit, Coerthas Western Highlands.
Skysteel Tools.Augmented Dragonsung: Third upgrade (IL485) — talk to Nimie (tool equipped or in your bag) for 'Ever Skyward'. From here the tool must be equipped while gathering/fishing. [[Crafters]] Craft 18 third-tier collectables at max collectability -> 90 gobbiegoo from Denys -> give to Nimie (each craft ~20 Purple/Skybuilders' Scrips; collectability returns 2/3/5, so 18 crafts best / 45 worst). [[Gatherers]] Gather 500 third-tier + 180 hidden -> 50 gobbiegoo, handed to Nimie with the 180 hidden. [[Fisher]] Catch 60 Petal Shell at Plum Spring, Yanxia -> 6 Fisher's Gobbiegoo to Nimie.
Skysteel Tools.Skysung: Fourth upgrade (IL500) — talk to Nimie for 'The Tools of Tomorrow', then finish 'Oddness in the End'. [[Crafters]] Craft 21 fourth-tier collectables at max collectability -> 105 highly viscous gobbiegoo -> Nimie (~420 best / 1,060 worst Purple or Skybuilders' Scrips). [[Gatherers]] Gather 600 fourth-tier + 200 hidden -> 60 highly viscous gobbiegoo, handed to Nimie with the 200 hidden. [[Fisher]] Catch 70 Allagan Hunter at the Alpha Quadrant, Azys Lla -> 7 Highly Viscous Fisher's Gobbiegoo to Nimie.
Skysteel Tools.Skybuilders': Final upgrade (IL510) — talk to Emeny for 'The Pinnacle of Possibility'; collectables go to Spanner, then Emeny. [[Crafters]] Craft 20 fifth-tier collectables at max collectability -> 60 oddly delicate parts -> Emeny (Expert Recipes, fixed macros work; ~400 Purple / 600 Skybuilders' Scrips best, 1,200 / 1,800 worst; non-currency mats gathered in The Diadem). [[Gatherers]] Gather 36 fifth-tier collectables + 750 Diadem items -> 250 oddly delicate parts + 25 inconceivably delicate parts -> Emeny (Diadem central isle). [[Fisher]] Gather 50 each of Flintstrike and Pickled Pom collectables at max collectability -> 200 Oddly Delicate Fishing Rod Parts + 200 Fishing Reel Parts -> Emeny.

Resplendent Tools._line: Shadowbringers Disciple of the Hand & Land tools — a single Resplendent upgrade, with crafters and gatherers earning theirs in completely different ways.
Resplendent Tools.Resplendent: [[Crafters]] Craft up a chain handed in to Limbeth: buy Material A (25 Purple Crafters' Scrips each), craft it into Component A and turn that in for Material B; 2 Material B make Component B, turned in for Material C; 2 Material C make Component C, turned in for Final Material. 60 Final Material buys the tool. At maximum collectability every step you need about 30 Material A per class (~750 Purple Crafters' Scrips); at minimum collectability up to 240 (~6,000). [[Gatherers]] Earned from gathering-log achievements — no materials: Miner records 220 unique miner-only items (I Found That: Miner VII -> Resplendent Minefiend's Pickaxe), Botanist 340 (Botanist VII -> Fieldfiend's Hatchet). Items from any expansion count, and Legendary Node items (Tomes of Regional Folklore) count too. [[Fisher]] Catch and record 1,140 unique fish (I Caught That VII -> Resplendent Tacklefiend's Rod).

Splendorous Tools._line: Endwalker Disciple of the Hand & Land tools, built at the Crystarium — crafters hand collectables to Quinnana (X:10.4, Y:7.7), upgrade items to Chora-Zoi (X:10.5, Y:7.7). Gatherers and the Fisher must have the current tool equipped while gathering/fishing (Fisher uses a Select Bait Ball from Quinnana). Seven stages: Splendorous -> Augmented -> Crystalline -> Chora-Zoi's -> Brilliant -> Vrandtic -> Lodestar.
Splendorous Tools.Splendorous: Base IL570 tools. Finish 'An Original Improvement' for a Splendorous Coffer, which becomes your current class's tool; extra classes' base tools cost 750 scrips from Quinnana in the Crystarium.
Splendorous Tools.Augmented: First upgrade (IL590) — repeatable quest 'A Dedicated Tool'. [[Crafters]] Craft 20 first-tier collectables (each from a 'Select' material at 25 Purple Crafters' Scrips, plus gathered mats) — ~500 scrips best, 1,500 worst. Almasty Fur / Petalouda Scales aren't gatherable (Hunting ventures or Bicolor traders). [[Gatherers]] Gather 60 of your collectable plus 180 hidden Splendorous Water/Earth Shards. [[Fisher]] Catch 30 each of Platinum Seahorse and Clavekeeper.
Splendorous Tools.Crystalline: Second upgrade (IL620) — repeatable quest 'An Adaptive Tool'. [[Crafters]] Craft 30 second-tier collectables (25 Purple Crafters' Scrips per 'Select' item; ~750 best / 2,250 worst). Ophiotauros Hide / Lunatender Blossom from Hunting ventures or Bicolor traders. [[Gatherers]] Gather 70 of your collectable plus 210 hidden Adaptive Fire/Lightning Crystals. [[Fisher]] Catch 40 each of Mirror Image and Spangled Pirarucu.
Splendorous Tools.Chora-Zoi's: Third upgrade (IL625) — repeatable quest 'A Tool of Her Own'. [[Crafters]] Craft 30 third-tier collectables (30 Purple Crafters' Scrips per 'Select' item; ~900 best / 2,700 worst). [[Gatherers]] Gather 70 of your collectable plus 210 hidden Custom Ice/Wind Crystals (Aetherial Reduction also yields the components). [[Fisher]] Catch 40 each of Gold Dustfish and Forgiven Melancholy.
Splendorous Tools.Brilliant: Fourth upgrade (IL630) — repeatable quest 'A Tool without Compare'. [[Crafters]] Craft 30 fourth-tier collectables (30 Purple Crafters' Scrips per 'Select' item; ~900 best / 2,700 worst). [[Gatherers]] Gather 70 of your collectable plus 210 hidden Brilliant Lightning/Earth Clusters (or Aetherial Reduction). [[Fisher]] Catch 40 each of Oil Slick and Gonzalo's Grace.
Splendorous Tools.Vrandtic: Fifth upgrade (IL635) — repeatable quest 'A Tool for the Ages'. [[Crafters]] Craft 20 fifth-tier collectables (Expert recipes; 35 Purple Crafters' Scrips per 'Select' item; ~700 best / 2,100 worst). [[Gatherers]] Gather ~74 of your collectable (best case via Aetherial Reduction; 110 if turned in to Quinnana) plus 220 hidden Inspirational Wind/Fire Clusters. [[Fisher]] Catch 43 each of Deadwood Shadow and Ronkan Bullion.
Splendorous Tools.Lodestar: Final upgrade (IL640) — repeatable quest 'Stand Tool, My Friend'. [[Crafters]] Craft 20 sixth-tier collectables (Expert recipes; 35 Purple Crafters' Scrips per 'Select' item; ~700 best / 2,100 worst). [[Gatherers]] Gather ~74 of your collectable (best case via Aetherial Reduction; 110 via Quinnana) plus 220 hidden Nightforged Ice/Water Clusters. [[Fisher]] Catch 43 each of Little Bounty and Saint Fathric's Face.

Cosmic Tools._line: Dawntrail Disciple of the Hand & Land tools (patch 7.2), upgraded entirely through Cosmic Exploration — there are no materials to craft, gather or catch. Get the first prototype from a Cosmic Prototype Coffer (quest 'A Cosmic Homecoming'); later class prototypes are free from Researchingway in the Cosmic zones (Sinus Ardorum, Phaenna, Oizys, Auxesia). Tools start at level 10 (ilvl 10) and climb a 19-step ladder to level 100 (ilvl 780). You upgrade by accruing per-class research data (Types I-VII) from stellar missions, then talking to Researchingway. Finishing a tool's final tier stage gives a global research bonus for the rest of that tier (+50% for 1-2 tools done, +100% for 3-4, +150% for 5+), so finish one tool at a time and do crafters before gatherers. The Overview/Relic tabs still track your Cosmic progress from FFXIV Collect.
Cosmic Tools.Cosmic: Novice tier. Climb from the base prototype through v0.2-v0.8 to the Cosmic tool using Type I-IV research data (per class, cumulative). Reaching Cosmic takes about 2,800 Type I, 2,900 Type II, 2,300 Type III and 1,500 Type IV. The tool doesn't need to be equipped to earn data, but equipping it for a whole mission adds a zone-credit bonus. [[Crafters]] Recommended on Oizys: run class D then C missions. [[Gatherers]] Recommended on Oizys: the class A 'Mineral Gravitational Stabilizers' (Miner) / 'Fibrous Gravitational Stabilizers' (Botanist). [[Fisher]] Recommended: 'Northwestern Water Inspection' and 'Absolute Specimen', then 'Aquatic Inspection I'.
Cosmic Tools.Stellar: Intermediate tier. v1.1-v1.4 up to the Stellar tool, now also needing Type V data. Cumulative totals at Stellar: about 4,700 Type I, 4,700 Type II, 4,700 Type III, 4,000 Type IV, 1,500 Type V. [[Crafters]] Recommended: class C then B missions. [[Gatherers]] Stay on class A, dipping into class B if Type V lags.
Cosmic Tools.Hyper: Advanced tier. v1.1-v1.2 up to the Hyper tool, adding Type VI data. Cumulative totals at Hyper: about 7,100 each of Types I-IV, 3,150 Type V, 1,900 Type VI. [[Crafters]] Recommended: class B then A (Type VI is only on class A and is the longest grind). [[Gatherers]] Focus class A 'Gravitational Stabilizers', using class B if Type V lags.
Cosmic Tools.Stellar (final): Expert tier — the final level 100 / ilvl 780 tool (the Stars stage). v1.1-v1.2 up to Stars, adding Type VII data. Cumulative totals at Stars: about 9,500 each of Types I-IV, 5,600 Type V, 2,700 Type VI, 1,600 Type VII. This is the current end of the line; further upgrades come in later patches.

Eurekan Armor._line: The Forbidden Land, Eureka (from Gerolt). Elemental set: base 40 Pyros Crystal, +1 +Hydatos (50 body/legs, 30 small), +2 +Eureka Fragment (35 body/legs, 21 small). Eurekan/Artifact set (Anemos line): 50 Protean (base), 150 (+1), 400 (+2), then 150 Anemos Crystal for the final Anemos stage — per piece.

Resistance Armor._line: From the Resistance Supplier. Bozjan (Southern Front) = Bozjan Coin (98/set). Augmented Bozjan = base piece + Bozjan Runner's Secrets (999/500 coin each or rare Castrum drops; ~3,498/set). Law's Order (Gangos) = Bozjan Gold Coin (12/set). Augmented Law's Order = Law's Order + Augmented Bozjan + Orderly Runner's Secrets, each made from 10 slot-specific Runner's Plating (Head/Body/Hand/Leg/Foot — 5 different items, 50 total/set; Delubrum Reginae Savage). Blade's (Zadnor) = Bozjan Platinum Coin (36/set).

Phantom Armor._line: The Occult Crescent (South Horn). Arcanaut's base = 4,000 Enlightenment Silver Piece/piece (20,000/set). +1 adds 3 Aetherspun Silver (≈1,200 Silver each) + 3 Aetherial Fixative (≈1,600 Gold each) per piece. +2 adds 3 Aetherspun Gold (treasure chests) + 6 X-Fixative (= 60 Sanguinite) per piece.
